name: Basic Mustard & Variations
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except egg yolks in a bowl and let stand for 2 hours.
2. Beat the egg yolks into the mixture.
3. Cook, stirring constantly over hot (not boiling) water until slightly thickened, about 5 minutes.
4. Cover and refrigerate for up to one month.
LIME MUSTARD: Add lime peel and juice when incorporating egg yolks; follow the basic mustard recipe. Serve with lamb, chicken or fish.
TARRAGON MUSTARD: Add tarragon when incorporating egg yolks; follow the basic mustard recipe. Serve with lamb, chicken, shrimp or steaks.
SPICY MUSTAR
